name: spt-models
description: Inference + model catalogue for the SPT Models GPU stack — chat, completion, embeddings, image / video / audio / music generation, transcription, rerank, plus per-model prompting guides — directly in Claude Code.

spt_base_url.title: SPT Gateway URL
spt_base_url.description: Base URL of your SPT Models Gateway. The MCP server appends /v1/* and /admin/api/* itself — do NOT include a trailing path.

spt_api_key.title: SPT API Key
spt_api_key.description: Bearer token for /v1/* inference endpoints. Create one in the SPT admin UI (Keys page).

spt_admin_token.title: SPT Admin Token (optional)
spt_admin_token.description: Admin token used for load_model / unload_model / refresh_prompting_guide. Leave empty to disable those ops-only tools.

spt_request_timeout.title: Request timeout (seconds)
spt_request_timeout.description: HTTP timeout for inference calls. Image / video generation can be slow — raise to 600+ for large diffusion models.

spt_verify_tls.title: Verify TLS certificate
spt_verify_tls.description: Set to 'false' to skip TLS verification (self-signed certs only — never in production).
